results.title: TCS Q1 revenue rises 2.7%, company adds over 9,000 to workforce
results.description: TCS reported June-quarter revenue of $7.6 billion, showing a modest year-on-year increase. The company added over nine thousand employees, marking significant workforce expansion. Consolidated net profit saw a sequential decline after a one-time legal charge. Operating margins decreased due to annual wage hikes, with a goal to return to twenty-five percent. TCS expects AI to evolve jobs rather than eliminate them, creating new roles.

European Investment Bank Grants €50 Million Loan to Lactinov Services
results.description: The European Investment Bank has approved a €50 million loan to Lactinov Services SAS, a subsidiary of Lact'Union. The loan will fund a modernization initiative focused on increasing capacity and reducing carbon emissions.

results.title: Suspected vandal in custody for allegedly throwing Molotov cocktails at religious institutions in Ozone Park and Woodhaven: NYPD
results.description: Police from the 102nd Precinct took a man into custody Thursday morning after he allegedly threw Molotov cocktails at religious buildings in Ozone Park and Woodhaven. In the first incident, the 36-year-old vandal allegedly targeted the Iglesia Bautista El Mesias Baptist Church, located at 97-44 75th St. in Ozone Park, just before midnight on July 8, according to authorities. The vandal threw one of the firebombs at the front door, but it bounced off and exploded on the ground, causing a fire that did no damage to the church, police said. The suspect then walked about a half-mile north into...

results.title: Sri Lanka ramps up dengue battle with mosquito control drive
results.description: Sri Lanka has recorded more than 56,422 dengue cases from January to July, adding pressure to the country’s healthcare system as the caseload continues to increase.
